    <item>
      <title>Researchers Reveal the Power of ‘Quantum Proofs’</title>
      <link>https://www.quantamagazine.org/researchers-reveal-the-power-of-quantum-proofs-20260706/</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.quantamagazine.org/researchers-reveal-the-power-of-quantum-proofs-20260706/</guid>
      <pubDate>Mon, 06 Jul 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[Some problems appear to require proofs that are themselves quantum objects, not ordinary classical descriptions.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>When The Machines Deserve Our Consideration</title>
      <link>https://www.noemamag.com/when-the-machines-deserve-our-consideration</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.noemamag.com/when-the-machines-deserve-our-consideration</guid>
      <pubDate>Thu, 02 Jul 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[We may never get definitive proof that AI systems are conscious, but we still need a practical standard for moral consideration.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>How Amsterdam invented the fire department</title>
      <link>https://worksinprogress.co/issue/how-amsterdam-invented-the-fire-department/</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://worksinprogress.co/issue/how-amsterdam-invented-the-fire-department/</guid>
      <pubDate>Wed, 01 Jul 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[Seventeenth-century Amsterdam reduced catastrophic fire damage through technology, organization, incentives, and civic capacity.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Semiquincentennial Blues</title>
      <link>https://longreads.com/2026/07/07/semiquincentennial-blues/</link>

      <pubDate>Fri, 03 Jul 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[An essay on America’s 250th birthday, race, patriotic performance, national mythology, and political exhaustion.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>The Meaning of Alienage for Wong Kim Ark</title>
      <link>https://www.publicbooks.org/the-meaning-of-alienage-for-wong-kim-ark/</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.publicbooks.org/the-meaning-of-alienage-for-wong-kim-ark/</guid>
      <pubDate>Mon, 06 Jul 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[The stakes of birthright citizenship were daily rights, mobility, legal status, and the vulnerability of Chinese immigrants and their U.S.-born children.]]></description>

items.title: Researchers Reveal the Power of ‘Quantum Proofs’
items.description: Some problems appear to require proofs that are themselves quantum objects, not ordinary classical descriptions.

items.description: We may never get definitive proof that AI systems are conscious, but we still need a practical standard for moral consideration.
